text_block_list.text:
After some time off, Narita Taishin stops by my
office.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? It's none of your... Ugh, I guess it is.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Same ol', same ol'. I took it easy and spent my
time relaxing.
It seems like Narita Taishin had a good break.
